message:
fix(security): fail closed when extra expected outputs mismatch replay hash

Add expected_outputs_match_hash() helper in replay_capsule.rs that
checks all declared expected outputs against the replay hash using
constant-time comparison, replacing the previous first-only check.
replay_and_verify() and VerifierSdk::verify_capsule() both use the
shared helper so the standalone replay and SDK verifier paths cannot
drift.

Add regression tests: test_replay_and_verify_extra_mismatched_output_fails
and test_verify_capsule_extra_mismatched_expected_output_fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
